items.title: Adults who can sit through a movie without reaching for their phone understand something most of us haven’t quite admitted — that the phone keeps promising rest, distraction, and connection, and rarely actually delivers any of them, and the small daily disappointment is what’s been quietly exhausting everyone who hasn’t put it down
